name: Leek & Potato Soup W/stiliton, Port, & Sage L
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter over low heat.
2. Add leek, onion, and garlic. Cook, covered with buttered wax paper and lid, stirring occasionally for 15-20 minutes until the onions soften.
3. Add stock and potatoes. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
4. Puree in a blender or food processor.
5. Return the puree to the pan. Stir in cream, dried sage, salt, and white pepper to taste.
6. Reheat over low heat.
7. Serve in bowls topped with port, fresh sage, and Stilton.
